arts.ttl: Tottenham £17m transfer boost confirmed ahead of next window
arts.sum: Marseille sporting director Mehdi Benatia has confirmed that his club will complete the permanent transfer of Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Pierre-Emile Hojbjerg in the summer. As part of the deal for the Danish midfielder, a clause was inserted into the contract that Marseille could make the deal permanent next summer for £17m.

arts.ttl: Lopetegui opts for unchanged side for Tottenham derby
arts.sum: The Czech, who has mastered the art of scoring in big moments, stepped up to be the West Ham hero for the second time this season in the 1-1 draw at Brentford, and will hoping for another landmark goal in Claret and Blue on his 167th Premier League appearance. West Ham United: Areola, Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Emerson, Rodríguez, Paquetá, Souček, Bowen ©, Kudus, Antonio
